title: Peruvian Potato Casserole
description: A hearty Peruvian-inspired casserole made with crispy potatoes, savory melted cheese, and a hint of spice.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss sliced potatoes with peruvian mustard until coated.
Transfer potatoes to a greased casserole dish.
Sprinkle half of the melted cheese blend over potatoes.
Bake for 20 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Remove from oven and top with remaining cheese.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
